groups: The only way to do great WRK is to love it
Believe you can and youre halfway there
It does not matter how slow you go as long as you do not stop
The best time to plant a tree was 20 yrs ago The second best time is now
Everything you can imagine is real
Stay hungry stay foolish
In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity
What we think we become
The future belongs to them who believe in the beauty of their dreams
Do what you can with what you have where you are
Success is not final failure is not fatal It is courage to continue that counts
Dream big start small act now
Fall seven times stand up eight
Done is better than perfect
Make each day your masterpiece
Small steps every day add up
If you can dream it you can do it
The harder I work the luckier I get
Dont count the days make the days count
Quality is not an act it is a habit
Well begun is half done
No pressure no diamonds
Little by little one travels far
Courage is grace under pressure
A goal without a plan is just a wish
Motivation starts habit keeps you going
The best way out is always through
You miss 100% of shots you dont take
Energy and persistence conquer all
Great things never came from comfort
Strive for progress not perfection
It seems impossible until its done
Chance favors the prepared mind
Do it with passion or not at all
Either I will find a way or make one
What you do today can improve all your tomorrows
Stars cant shine without darkness
The secret of getting ahead is getting started
Be so good they cant ignore you
Hard work beats idle talent
Every expert was once a beginner
The journey is the reward
